content.about: Kerwick Appraisals provides accurate, objective, and uniform valuations of personal property in the South Florida area. Operated by Sharon Kerwick, who has been appraising since 1976, the firm works with insurance companies, trust departments, attorneys, private individuals, and government agencies including U.S. Customs to establish reliable property records for financial, legal, and protective purposes. Specializes in antiques, residential contents, oriental rugs, and silver.
content.notes: Serving South Florida since 1976. ASA, ISA CAPP, and CRA certified. Works with U.S. Customs and insurance companies.
